# Change Shipping Address

To change your shipping address before your order from Acme Shop is dispatched, log in to your account and go to the "Order Management" section. Select the order and, if it is still in the "Processing" status, you can click on "Edit Shipping Address" to update the information. Changes must be made before the order is marked as "Shipped," typically within 24 to 48 hours after placing the order. After dispatch, contact the carrier for redirection options, though this is not guaranteed.

[Source: order_management.md#change-shipping-address]
